title: Yet Another Gravestone Mod [YAGM]
description: Seals your items and XP in a gravestone when you die, with biome-themed graves, naturally forming cemeteries, and tameable Ghost companions.
body:
![Title](https://shatterbyte.com/cloud/image/mod_page/yagm/title.png)
Yet Another Gravestone Mod [YAGM] is a mod that reimagines death in Minecraft. Instead of watching your hard-earned items scatter across the ground and slowly tick toward despawning, your entire inventory and experience are sealed inside a gravestone that falls gracefully into the world and waits for your return. Each grave adapts to the place where you died: the mod automatically chooses a style that matches the surrounding biome, and also assigns one of four tiers depending on how much you were carrying. That way, a single glance is enough to tell just how costly that death really was.
![Graves](https://shatterbyte.com/cloud/image/mod_page/yagm/graves.png)
Sometimes a restless spirit lingers at the place where you fell - a Ghost, a new mob forever bound to the place of its death. It can be tamed, and until the very last second of its existence, it will become your loyal companion, protecting you from danger. Ghosts also have moods of their own, and in response to your actions they can become shy, angry, or joyful. They can even be bred, gradually growing your spectral army.
![Ghosts](https://shatterbyte.com/cloud/image/mod_page/yagm/ghosts.png)
Out of the box, the mod works with Curios API, Accessories, and Trinkets - so equipped trinkets are stored and restored right alongside the rest of your gear, with no manual sorting or extra compatibility addons needed.
